modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble uploading a Google Docs document.

full_description_text:  
So, I'm trying to upload a Google Docs document. I just can't figure out how to do it. It seems like it should be easy, but I'm stuck. Any help would be great!
short_description: Trouble uploading a Google Docs document.
description: So, I'm trying to upload a Google Docs document. I just can't figure out how to do it. It seems like it should be easy, but I'm stuck. Any help would be great!
